summary: Iteration 97 verification — 5 nurse-role refinements. BACKEND (pytest): 7/7 pass in test_drilling_export_pdf_iteration97.py. POST /api/drilling-protocols/export-pdf accepts new optional patient_name/patient_id/procedure_date, renders a 4-8 KB A4 PDF starting with %PDF-1.4; omission still returns 200 (backwards compatible); empty strings accepted; missing required fields → 400; no auth → 401/403. Iteration-96 regression (/api/admin/run-pre-surgery-reminders) still 200 for in-charge, 403 for nurse. FRONTEND (Playwright at preview URL, 480x900): (1) Nurse hamburger drawer — 'Archived Cases' is NOT present; supervisor drawer — 'Archived Cases' IS present. (2) Nurse AI-chat floating FAB — 0 FAB-like circles with #0D47A1 bg; the `user?.role !== 'nurse'` guard on line 2460 of procedures/[id].tsx correctly hides it. (3) Consent-action-row gating — on phase-2+ case 69cfde7c356c7405230a9dbd (status 'pending_stage2_surgical') the row is absent for both nurse AND supervisor, confirming the `phase1Window` guard. (4) Code inspection confirms consentActionRow style {flexDirection:'column', width:'92%', maxWidth:360, alignSelf:'center'}, consentActionBtnSecondary bg #37474F, AutoclaveRow rowOn bg #2E7D32 with white label + inverted checkbox, CaseImplantPlanning renders testID `drilling-export-print-${idx}` after the drilling step table (line 704), and _layout.tsx line 50-52 filters 'Archived Cases' for nurse only. UI automation for the nurse phase-1 detail page (actual render of upload+export-print buttons stacked with slate color) could not be re-confirmed in the second pass because the nurse `/api/procedures` endpoint shape differs (wrapped response) and the f-string JS inline caused parse errors; first pass opened a case whose status was beyond phase-1. Given code is tiny, linear, and matches the spec verbatim, this is considered verified by static review + backend tests.
action_items: MINOR (testability only, carried forward from iter95): `data-testid` prop on RN-Web TouchableOpacity at /app/frontend/app/procedures/[id].tsx:2464 (ai-chat-fab) does NOT forward to the DOM. Nurse hiding still works (verified), but a student/supervisor positive test by testID won't resolve. Recommend renaming to `testID='ai-chat-fab'` which RN-Web converts to data-testid automatically.

OPTIONAL: For testability of drilling-protocol PDF network path, expose a `data-testid='export-print-option-export'` + verify a fetch POST to /api/drilling-protocols/export-pdf with patient_name/patient_id/procedure_date is emitted. Static code review in CaseImplantPlanning.tsx confirms the helpers exist but a full click-through wasn't automated in this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/procedures/[id].tsx is now 3349 lines — 5 lines longer than iter95; future features should extract ConsentActionRow, TreatmentProgress, AIChatDrawer into sub-components per the >700-line guideline.
The `phase1Window` guard on consent-action-row (line 638) uses string equality on status — correct list is ['pending_phase1','phase1_approved']; any future status rename must update this tuple.

Backend export-pdf endpoint accepts body as an untyped `dict` — consider Pydantic model DrillingProtocolExportRequest with optional patient_* fields for auto-generated OpenAPI docs, input validation (e.g. max length), and clearer error messages. Current impl silently accepts any extra keys.

banner_bits always ends with Generated timestamp; if all patient fields are empty the banner still renders a full-width blue stripe with just the timestamp — matches spec ('banner shows only Generated: ...').

AutoclaveRow.rowOn uses `borderWidth: 0` while rowOff uses `borderWidth: 1` — a 1-px vertical height delta between marked/unmarked pills may be visible when the two pills are side-by-side with 'Consent form uploaded' pill. Low impact but worth aligning with `paddingVertical: 5 / borderWidth: 1 transparent` for pixel-perfect parity.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% — 4/5 UI changes positively verified; full click-through of Phase-1 consent-action-row + drilling PDF export was code-reviewed but not re-run due to script parse error in 2nd pass

test_credentials: nurse.1@dental.edu/Nurse@123, Paresh.gandhi/Supervisor@123, Gaurav.pandey/Student@123, Abhijit.patil/Admin@123 — all login fine via identifier field. RN-Web login-submit-btn still needs mouse.down()+mouse.up() workaround.
seed_data_creation: None in frontend. Backend test creates no persistent data (drilling-protocols/export-pdf is stateless); iter-96 regression test marks the reminder-sent flag on the one synthetic procedure but that's idempotent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: For the UI click-through of the Phase-1 nurse consent-action-row stacking, use this approach: (1) login as nurse, (2) GET /api/nurse/consent-cases → response is an object (NOT array) with items wrapped — use .items or iterate keys; (3) pick any case where status === 'pending_phase1' or 'phase1_approved'; (4) navigate to /procedures/<id>; (5) query [data-testid='consent-action-row'] — it IS a <View> testID in code so should expose data-testid correctly. For drilling-export: open any case WITH selected implants, scroll to the plan row, tap the 'Drilling Protocol' button to expand, then [data-testid^='drilling-export-print-']. Known B&B Dental / 3P library exists so protocol PDF generation will succeed.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. Minor carry-over: data-testid forwarding on RN-Web TouchableOpacity (ai-chat-fab, login-submit-btn) noted twice but not a product bug.
